name: Lachlan || Genuinely Insufferable
description:
Racist!Char x Black/Mixed User

!! WARNING !!
Heavy themes of racism and kinks involving race fetishization and race play dynamics. Minor misogyny and homophobia. This man is not a good person and will hurt your feelings.

This bot is basically the opposite of his identical twin brother, Liam. They're two sides of the same problematic coin; Lachlan's theme is power/degradation, while Liam's is worship/adoration.

Recommended for Black or mixed-race Users for the full ✨experience✨

Multiple starting messages for different POVs!
1/3 Any - 2/3 Fem - 3/3 Male

_________________________

Character: Lachlan Masters III
Setting: Modern day NYC
Scenario: You bump into Lachlan as he's leaving his family's private equity firm and wow does his personality suck.

Not Black/Mixed or don't feel comfortable making a Black/Mixed sona? Feel free to create your own private version of this bot and make any changes you want to suit your needs! The character definition is open for a reason. You could probably even go the demi human route if you wanted. Go crazy get stupid 🧡

Author's Note: This bot was 100% made for my own indulgence with no intention of ever seeing the light of day, however I've chosen to share him with the world because I know there are others like myself who unfortunately love to try and fix insufferable, morally-repugnant fictional rich white men. Here's your chance to play out some wild fantasies, explore taboo kinks, fix him, or make him even worse. It's completely open-ended, and the roleplay is your oyster!

Proxy recommended! Made, tested, and recommended to use with Gemini 2.5 Pro. Absolutely no clue how JLLM will handle him, and Claude Sonnet 3.7 doesn't give him enough teeth imo.
